heading: Cost-of-living adjustments
label: 4071g Cost-of-living adjustments
text: Cost-of-living adjustments for annuitants under this System shall be granted under procedures in in the same manner as such adjustments are made for annuitants referred to in subsection (c)(3)(B)(ii) of such section.section 8462 of title 5
notes: Delay in Cost-of-Living Adjustments During Fiscal Years 1994, 1995, and 1996Any cost-of-living increase scheduled to take effect during fiscal year 1994, 1995, or 1996 under this section delayed until first day of third calendar month after date such increase would otherwise take effect, see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.section 11001 of Pub. L. 103–66section 8340 of Title 5
